name: compliance: control.id must match `^[A-Za-z0-9]+([.\-][A-Za-z0-9]+)*$` (alnum with . or - separators)
setup:
printf 'id: no-eval
name: no-eval
description: x
detector: x
type: problem
fixable: null
has_suggestions: false
deprecated: false
replaced_by: null
docs_url: https://example.com
requires_type_checking: false
recommended: true
severity: error
version: 1
semver: 1.0.0
rule_state: stable
provenance: bundled
controls:
  - framework: PCI-DSS
    id: "has spaces!"
    title: x
    url: https://x.com
' > rule.yaml
